methods.description: This method involves collecting and normalizing culture data for the relationship between Mg/Ca and carbonate system parameters for various foraminifera species. The purpose is to determine the pH sensitivity and examine the relationship between seawater Mg/Ca and shell Mg/Ca.

steps.description: Utilize data from culture experiments of G. ruber grown at the Interuniversity Institute for Marine Science, Eilat, between January 2010 and November 2013.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch culture experiment data for G. ruber

steps.description: Normalize Mg/Ca to the ratio expected at 26°C and a salinity of 35‰, specific to each species.
steps.searchable_summary: normalize Mg/Ca data to standard conditions

steps.description: For G. ruber, use the Mg/Ca-temperature calibration of Kisakürek et al. (2008), the Mg/Ca-salinity relationship of Hönisch et al. (2013), and the seawater-test Mg/Ca calibration of Evans et al. (2016).
steps.searchable_summary: apply specific calibrations to G. ruber data

steps.description: For G. bulloides and O. universa, normalize data to 26°C assuming exponential coefficient of 0.09.
steps.searchable_summary: normalize G. bulloides and O. universa data to 26°C
outputs: normalized data for G. bulloides and O. universa

steps.description: Calculate DIC and [CO2−3] using co2sys based on constants from Raitzsch et al. (2010).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate DIC and carbonate ion concentration

methods.description: This method describes the laser-ablation analysis of foraminifera cultures to measure Mg/Ca ratios using a laser-ablation system.

steps.description: Clean foraminifera in 10% NaOCl, rinse in deionised water, and mount on carbon tape.
Identify individual chambers precipitated in culture by elevated 135Ba/138Ba.
steps.searchable_summary: identify cultured chambers by Ba isotope ratio

steps.description: Use NIST610 as a calibration standard for Mg.
Perform data reduction using in-house Matlab software.

methods.method_name: St. Stephens Quarry Laser-ablation Data Analysis
methods.description: This method involves analyzing laser-ablation data from St. Stephens Quarry to assess foraminifera preservation and compare with solution ICPMS data.

steps.description: Assess Mn/Ca ratios to evaluate diagenetic overgrowths.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate Mn/Ca ratios for diagenetic bias

steps.description: Compare laser-ablation Mg/Ca data with solution ICPMS data.
steps.searchable_summary: compare laser-ablation and solution ICPMS Mg/Ca data

steps.description: Infer applicability of solution analyses calibrations to laser-ablation data.
